name: Cala Mica
description: A little-known, shell-shaped virgin cove with mixed sand and pebbles, set beside an old farmhouse. It rewards the walker who follows the Camí de Cavalls beyond Cavalleria.

highlights: a shell-shaped wild cove, little known
extending the Camí de Cavalls from Binimel·la or Cavalleria
taking water and shade: no facilities
